meta.note: Source URL from RSS feed (for deduplication)
Which RSS feed this event was imported from
Whether this event was imported from RSS feed
Full HTML content from RSS feed
Venue name extracted from RSS feed
Venue address extracted from RSS feed

This field can be used to manually add a custom agenda/description to an event that gets imported. Often times the imported description is poorly formatted. On the bitplebs pages, this field will be used as the event description isntead of the imported description.
